subject: Accounting
title: Auditor Independence
description: A short lesson to help you apply Auditor Independence.

hook.text: Arthur Andersen earned more from consulting for Enron than from auditing it. Independence died.

buildup.text: When auditors depend on a client for big fees, the temptation to overlook problems grows.

discovery.text: Post-scandal rules now limit what consulting services auditors can sell to their audit clients.

twist.text: Despite reforms, the Big Four still earn more from consulting than auditing. The tension persists.

climax.text: True independence requires more than rules—it demands a culture that prizes integrity over fees.

punchline.text: You can't guard the vault and sell the keys.

quiz.question: Why is auditor independence important?
options: Auditors must not depend on clients for non-audit fees
